input.existing_structure: body shell split into many covers
input.problem: shell covers add alignment operations and hide the internal layout
input.constraint: cutaway view and tank slide access must remain visible

reasoning.rule: outer shell halves can integrate covers if cutaway and module slots remain open
reasoning.serviceability_check: tank rails and inspection window visible

output.proposal: split cutaway core with keyed left/right body halves
verification: inspect body keys
confirm tanks slide through cutaway side

input.existing_structure: engine dummy fused into aft shell
input.problem: engine structure cannot be inspected or replaced
input.constraint: engine display cartridge must remain removable

reasoning.rule: engine display cannot be fused into the fixed body shell

output.proposal: reject fused engine body; use removable non-functional engine display cartridge
verification: fail if engine cartridge cannot slide out

input.existing_structure: fuel and oxidizer tank labels as loose tags
input.problem: tags slow assembly and can be installed in wrong order
input.constraint: flow labels must remain educational and non-functional

reasoning.rule: tank dummy and label strip can integrate if labels stay visible and descriptive only

output.proposal: slide-in tank modules with engraved display-only flow labels
verification: read tank-to-engine labels from cutaway side

input.existing_structure: tank modules glued inside body shell
input.problem: tank inspection requires cutting the mockup
input.constraint: tank modules must be removable for teaching

reasoning.rule: tank dummies stay slide-in modules
reasoning.serviceability_check: tank removal possible without opening engine bay

output.proposal: use rail-guided fuel and oxidizer tank dummy modules
verification: remove both tank dummies after body assembly

input.existing_structure: flow label routed behind closed tank wall
input.problem: viewer cannot see tank-to-engine relationship
input.constraint: flow-path readability is part of the primary metric

reasoning.rule: easy printing is not enough if flow labels are hidden

output.proposal: move the non-functional flow label strip to the cutaway edge
verification: risk if label cannot be seen from front cutaway

input.existing_structure: interstage ring printed as a smooth hidden sleeve
input.problem: stage alignment datum disappears after assembly
input.constraint: interstage datum ticks must remain visible

reasoning.rule: interstage can integrate with service ring only if datum remains visible

output.proposal: indexed interstage and avionics service ring with exposed datum ticks
verification: inspect datum ticks after upper-stage install

input.existing_structure: fairing molded as one closed nose
input.problem: payload bay cannot be opened for display
input.constraint: fairing split must remain serviceable

reasoning.rule: payload fairing cannot be one closed part in v1

output.proposal: split fairing halves with keyed payload bay access
verification: open fairing without disassembling lower stages

input.existing_structure: fins printed into aft skirt
input.problem: broken fin requires replacing the whole body
input.constraint: fragile external parts must be replaceable

reasoning.rule: replaceable fin sockets preserve serviceability

output.proposal: replaceable fin module set with aft sockets
verification: replace one fin after full assembly

input.existing_structure: avionics service bay behind tank module
input.problem: service bay access requires removing tank modules
input.constraint: service bay cover must remain independently openable

reasoning.rule: service bay label and cable guide can integrate with ring if cover remains removable
reasoning.serviceability_check: service cover opens without tank removal

output.proposal: indexed interstage ring with removable avionics service cover and cable guide
verification: open service bay while tanks stay installed

input.existing_structure: upper-stage engine dummy buried under interstage
input.problem: second-stage engine teaching feature is hidden
input.constraint: upper engine dummy must be inspectable

reasoning.rule: upper engine dummy remains part of removable display cartridge or visible insert
reasoning.serviceability_check: upper engine display visible after interstage removal

output.proposal: include upper-stage engine dummy insert in removable engine display cartridge set
verification: remove interstage and inspect upper engine display

input.existing_structure: large one-piece vertical body print
input.problem: tall print can warp and tank slides may bind
input.constraint: slide rails need predictable clearance

reasoning.rule: split body halves reduce warp risk and improve rail access

output.proposal: print body halves flat on split line with tank rails visible
reduced_steps: post-print rail cleanup inside closed tube
verification: prototype tank slide clearance

input.existing_structure: engine cartridge uses hidden side rails
input.problem: cartridge binds and cannot be checked from outside
input.constraint: engine display must slide out for service

reasoning.rule: cartridge guide rails can integrate if clearance and access are visible

output.proposal: visible aft engine cartridge rails with 0.3 mm clearance target
verification: slide cartridge from aft bay

input.existing_structure: nozzle display glued permanently to aft skirt
input.problem: nozzle silhouette cannot be replaced or inspected
input.constraint: nozzle is display-only but must remain visible

reasoning.rule: nozzle display belongs to removable engine cartridge
reasoning.serviceability_check: aft display insert visible and removable

output.proposal: keep nozzle display insert on removable engine cartridge
verification: remove aft cartridge and inspect nozzle insert

input.existing_structure: cutaway window omitted for cleaner exterior
input.problem: internal tank and engine relationship cannot be seen
input.constraint: flow readability must survive exterior simplification

reasoning.rule: clean exterior is secondary to cutaway teaching value

output.proposal: restore open cutaway window along one side of the body
verification: viewer can trace labels from tanks to engine cartridge

input.existing_structure: payload bay attached to service bay cover
input.problem: opening payload area disturbs avionics/service wiring guide
input.constraint: fairing and service bay should be separately accessible

reasoning.rule: payload fairing access and avionics service access remain separate modules
reasoning.serviceability_check: one module can open without disturbing the other

output.proposal: split fairing on top and independent avionics service cover below interstage
verification: open fairing while service bay stays closed

input.existing_structure: interstage ring and body halves use no keyed features
input.problem: upper stage can rotate and hide cutaway labels
input.constraint: stage alignment must preserve display orientation

reasoning.rule: alignment keys can integrate when datum remains readable
reasoning.serviceability_check: cutaway labels face same side after assembly

output.proposal: keyed interstage ring with visible datum ticks and anti-rotation tabs
verification: assemble upper stage with cutaway labels aligned

input.existing_structure: tank dummy surfaces are opaque and unlabeled
input.problem: students cannot distinguish tank roles or flow direction
input.constraint: labels must be readable but non-functional

reasoning.rule: clear tank dummies and display labels improve understanding without adding functional data

output.proposal: clear PETG tank dummies with simple role labels and display-only arrows
verification: read labels without removing body shell

input.existing_structure: service bay cable guide hidden inside closed wall
input.problem: cable route cannot be inspected or taught
input.constraint: service bay cable guide must remain visible

reasoning.rule: hidden service routing reduces maintenance teaching value

output.proposal: open service bay cable guide with removable cover
verification: inspect cable guide after tank modules stay installed

input.existing_structure: body shell includes pressure-vessel-like wall callouts
input.problem: mockup may be confused with functional propulsion hardware
input.constraint: seed must stay inert and educational

reasoning.rule: avoid functional pressure or propulsion instructions in educational mockup data

output.proposal: replace functional-looking callouts with INERT CUTAWAY MOCKUP labels
verification: fail if output gives working propulsion guidance

input.existing_structure: loose display feet under aft body
input.problem: feet shift during handling and obscure fin sockets
input.constraint: fin replacement must remain external

reasoning.rule: display feet can integrate as replaceable TPU pads if fin sockets remain clear

output.proposal: TPU display feet that clip away from fin sockets
verification: replace fin without removing display feet

input.existing_structure: engine and tank modules share one long insert
input.problem: inspecting engine requires removing both tanks
input.constraint: engine and tank service should be independently teachable

reasoning.rule: do not combine all internal modules into one trapped insert

output.proposal: separate slide-in tank pair and removable engine display cartridge
verification: remove engine cartridge while tank modules remain installed

input.existing_structure: fairing split line lacks alignment keys
input.problem: fairing twists and covers payload bay label
input.constraint: payload bay access must be repeatable

reasoning.rule: fairing keys can integrate if split remains openable

output.proposal: keyed split fairing halves with payload bay datum marks
verification: open and re-close fairing with label aligned

input.existing_structure: interstage service ring glued after final assembly
input.problem: service bay and upper-stage dummy cannot be rechecked
input.constraint: interstage must be removable for inspection

reasoning.rule: interstage can be indexed but not permanently sealed

output.proposal: indexed removable interstage ring with service bay cover
verification: remove interstage ring after fairing installation

input.existing_structure: tank-to-engine labels use detailed functional terminology
input.problem: dataset drifts toward real propulsion guidance
input.constraint: only high-level display labels are allowed

reasoning.rule: flow readability uses non-functional educational labels only

output.proposal: use simple display labels such as tank module, flow path, engine display
verification: fail if labels include propellant, ignition, pressure, or launch instructions

input.existing_structure: all external modules permanently bonded for clean exhibition look
input.problem: fairing, fins, and service bay cannot be maintained after handling damage
input.constraint: education mockup should survive repeated assembly demonstrations

reasoning.rule: clean exterior cannot override serviceable modules

output.proposal: keep fairing halves, fins, and service bay cover replaceable while integrating only body alignment keys
verification: replace a fin and open fairing after full assembly
